title: Punta Arenas, MA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Punta Arenas, MA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Punta Arenas is a city in MA with a population of 130,000. The southernmost mainland city in the world, a gateway to Patagonia and Antarctica with a rich maritime history.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
